raiz.texto: Borealis claims co-equal operational authority based on its dominant contribution to life support hardware. Asserts that without its contributed systems the habitat cannot sustain life regardless of other considerations. Demands equal representation in all operational decisions and rejects any framework that subordinates its crew to another nation's command. Proposes a rotating command structure with periodic authority transfers. Additionally argues that its exclusive resource extraction capability makes it the most strategically essential crew for long-term survival and that any resource allocation must prioritize its geological operations.
